news.summary: BREA, California - April 9, 2025 - Mullen Automotive Inc. (NASDAQ: MULN) disclosed a new Partnership and Supply Agreement with Enpower Greentech Inc. (EGI), a prominent player in advanced lithium-ion battery production and technology. This collaboration aims to produce and supply Mullen's SWIFT series SSB. The Enpower EGI SWIFT SSB line is designed for various purposes including commercial vehicles, aerospace, marine, hobby vehicles, material handling, power tools, medical equipment, and drones. This strategic alliance is set to bolster Mullen's position in the electric vehicle market and enhance EGI's foothold in the industry.
news.headline: Mullen Automotive partners with Enpower Greentech to build SWIFT semi solid-state batteries for various industrial applications.
Fed's Kashkari: Falling neutral rate due to tariffs reduces immediate need for rate hike.
Fed's Kashkari: First priority must be keeping long-run inflation expectations anchored.

news.summary: In an announcement made on April 9, 2025, in Boston, the Invest in Others Charitable Foundation revealed significant changes to its leadership team. Jessica Dunham has been appointed as the Chief Operating Officer, while Faith Bitterman will take on the role of Director of Programs. Additionally, Emily Burns Perryman will join the organization as the new Head of Marketing & Communications. These appointments mark a new chapter for IiO as they continue their mission as a nonprofit organization dedicated to making a positive impact.
news.headline: Invest in Others Charitable Foundation promotes Jessica Dunham to COO, Faith Bitterman as Director of Programs, and welcomes Emily Burns Perryman as Head of Marketing & Communications.

news.summary: Students at National Heritage Academies are delving into basic engineering concepts and honing vital social skills like teamwork and communication in Grand Rapids, Michigan. The initiative began on April 9, 2025, at Grand River Preparatory High School. The students are gaining hands-on experience from scratch, starting with a block of wood.
news.headline: Grand River Prep Robotics Team equips students with engineering skills and social development, from teamwork to communications. Grand Rapids, MI, April 9, 2025.

news.summary: Frontline Road Safety, a leading provider of pavement marking services in the United States, has recently completed the acquisition of InfraStripe. This acquisition consolidates their position as the largest company in the industry. With this transaction, Frontline Road Safety solidifies its presence in the market, further expanding its reach across the country. This strategic move will enable the company to enhance its service offerings and cater to a wider customer base.
news.headline: Frontline Road Safety acquires InfraStripe, expanding its national platform. Leader in pavement marking services in U.S.

news.summary: The latest cases offer businesses with advanced, flexible, and affordable cloud computing options, ensuring high performance and scalability.
news.headline: 5th Gen AMD EPYC processors offer top performance for Google Cloud C4D and H4D VMs, enhancing cloud solutions.

news.summary: A new tool called ScamCheck has been introduced by Carefull in New York. It is powered by artificial intelligence and is specifically created to quickly identify, examine, and stop scams before they result in financial losses. This innovative solution aims to provide swift protection against potential scams, showcasing the continuous development in AI technology for fraud prevention.
news.headline: Carefull launches ScamCheck AI tool to protect seniors from scams, detecting and preventing financial harm proactively.

news.summary: Astound, a leading provider of Internet, Mobile, and TV services, revealed its continued collaboration with Habitat for Humanity to back affordable homeownership in communities both within and beyond Astound's service range. This marks the second year of partnership between the two entities, with their initial alliance dating back to April 2024. Last year, Astound organized a total of 48 employee volunteer events, boasting an impressive turnout of 498 volunteers who engaged in activities across 26 cities within 11 states nationwide. Their collective efforts amounted to a substantial contribution of 3,000 volunteer hours towards supporting Habitat for Humanity's mission.
news.headline: Astound continues partnership with Habitat for Humanity in 2nd year, 498 volunteers in 26 cities across 11 states in 2025.

news.summary: American Integrity Insurance Company based in Tampa, Florida has promoted Patrick Madigan to the position of Senior Vice President of Underwriting and Client Services. In his new role, Patrick will be responsible for overseeing the company's underwriting strategy and improving risk management practices. He will also focus on enhancing service offerings for policyholders and agency partners. Patrick's leadership has played a key role in establishing American Integrity as a reputable figure in property insurance.
news.headline: Patrick Madigan promoted to Senior VP of Underwriting and Client Services at American Integrity Insurance Company in Tampa, FL.

news.summary: Frontdoor, Inc., a top provider of home warranties traded on NASDAQ as FTDR, disclosed plans to unveil its Q1 2025 financial outcomes and conduct a conference call on May 1, 2025, at 7:30 a.m. CT (8:30 a.m. ET). To join the call, individuals should sign up at https://www.webcaster4.com/Webcast/Page/3067/52314 and will later receive access information via email. This news comes as Frontdoor continues its trend as the leading company in the home warranty sector.
news.headline: Frontdoor, Inc. (NASDAQ: FTDR) to announce Q1 2025 results on May 1, 2025. Conference call at 7:30am CT (8:30am ET).

news.summary: According to recent reports, the unemployment rate in the country has dropped to 4.8%, its lowest level in over a decade. This decrease represents around 250,000 fewer unemployed individuals compared to last year. Additionally, the economy has seen a growth of 3.5% in the last quarter, marking a significant improvement. The government has stated that the job market is steadily improving, with sectors such as technology and healthcare showing promising growth and creating new employment opportunities. Despite these positive trends, concerns remain about wage stagnation and underemployment in certain regions. Experts predict continued economic growth in the coming months, which is expected to further reduce the unemployment rate and boost overall job market stability.
news.headline: Oil prices plummet amid weakening economic confidence due to China-U.S. tariffs.

news.summary: On April 9, 2025, in Tampa, Florida, Better Choice Company, Inc. (NYSE American: BTTR), a company focusing on pet health and wellness, disclosed receiving official confirmation from NYSE American LLC that they have regained compliance with all ongoing listing criteria outlined in Part 10 of the NYSE American Company Guide.
news.headline: Better Choice Company (NYSE: BTTR) complies with NYSE American listing standards, receives formal notice - April 09, 2025.

news.summary: RPM Raceway is enhancing its venue with an unprecedented 3,600-foot track and cutting-edge racing technology. Located in Long Island, New York, the immersive racing and entertainment destination is celebrating the reopening of its Long Island location on Wednesday, April 9, 2025.
news.headline: RPM Raceway Long Island reopens with the world's longest indoor go-kart track at 3,600 feet, featuring the latest racing technology.

news.summary: Hutt, with years of experience in regulations, joins to support the progress of a nanoparticle technology platform. On April 9, 2025, EVŌQ Nano, a company specializing in nanoscience creating unique nanoparticles for various industries, revealed this development.
news.headline: Peter Hutt joins EVŌQ Nano as a board member, bringing regulatory expertise to advance nanoparticle tech.

news.summary: On April 9, 2025, in Los Angeles, Venbrook Group LLC revealed the launch of a Corporate Benefits & Specialty Health division. As a leading independently owned insurance brokerage, claims, and risk management consulting firm in the U.S., Venbrook aims to further expand its offerings. The company's new division will focus on providing specialized health services. Known for its rapid growth, Venbrook continues to solidify its position in the industry with this strategic move.
news.headline: Venbrook Group expands benefits division, names Alison Myers president of new practice in Los Angeles on April 9, 2025.

news.summary: A renowned pro-aging beauty company has teamed up with Kristin Chenoweth to promote confidence and honor older women through a lighthearted online initiative and popular Age-Based Sale. In a recent announcement from New York on April 9, 2025, Laura Geller Beauty, a leading brand in this space, shared its plans to elevate mature women and empower them through unique campaigns.
news.headline: Laura Geller Beauty names Kristin Chenoweth as CMO for National Mature Women's Day, launching digital campaign and Age-Based Sale.

news.summary: The California Rare Disease Access Coalition, the Hemophilia Council of California, and the Plasma Protein Therapeutics Association are backing AB 725, introduced by Assembly Member Solache.
news.headline: California groups advocate for increasing access to plasma-derived medicines through AB 725.

news.summary: In Richfield, Ohio, on April 9, 2025, Navigate360 announced updates to its safety management system, crucial for schools and first responders. Time is vital in emergencies, and the enhanced system provides quick response tools. This integrated solution aims to equip personnel with the necessary resources to act promptly, as every second is crucial for saving lives.
news.headline: Navigate360 is expanding its emergency management solution for schools and first responders to act immediately in life-threatening situations.

news.summary: Rory Jacobson has recently joined Carbon Direct as the Head of Policy in New York City. He brings with him a wealth of experience from his time at the Department of Energy. This move signifies a strategic shift for Carbon Direct as they look to enhance their policy engagement efforts. The company is poised to benefit greatly from Jacobson's expertise, with hopes of further establishing themselves as a leader in the sustainable energy sector.
news.headline: Rory Jacobson joins Carbon Direct as Head of Policy after serving at Department of Energy.

news.summary: In Peterborough, Ontario, Westinghouse Electric Company and Celeros Flow Technology (Celeros FT) have signed a memorandum of understanding (MoU) to collaborate on nuclear new-build projects in Canada and worldwide. As per the agreement, Celeros FT may create valves and pumps for crucial AP1000® and AP300™ initiatives. This partnership aims to advance nuclear projects, with Celeros FT providing expertise in designing and fabricating equipment. The MoU signifies a promising alliance between the two companies to support the global nuclear industry.
news.headline: Westinghouse and Celeros FT partner for nuclear projects, potential to design valves/pumps for AP1000® and AP300™.

news.summary: Cummins Inc. (NYSE: CMI) has named John Gaidoo as the Vice President and Chief Legal Officer starting on June 1, taking over from Nicole Lamb-Hale who will now serve as Chief Administrative Officer and Corporate Secretary. Gaidoo, with a 14-year history at Cummins, has made a substantial contribution to the company's achievements, his teams, and the communities he engages with. According to Jennifer Rumsey, Chair and CEO of Cummins Inc., Gaidoo's appointment reflects his significant impact on the company.
news.headline: John Gaidoo appointed as VP & Chief Legal Officer at Cummins Inc, effective June 1. He succeeds Nicole Lamb-Hale.
Fed's Kashkari: The first priority must be keeping long-run inflation expectations anchored.
Fed's Kashkari: Could revise outlook if uncertainty rapidly resolves.

news.summary: Miami is experiencing a surge in construction and renewable energy projects, leading to a high demand for skilled electrical contractors in Florida. Gold Coast School of Construction has introduced the Florida Unlimited Electrical Contractor Exam Prep Course to assist electricians, supervisors, and business owners in passing their exams, securing licenses, and advancing their careers. This initiative comes as opportunities in the sector reach unprecedented levels, with a focus on supporting individuals to navigate the licensing process and capitalize on the booming industry.
news.headline: Florida's Gold Coast School of Construction introduces new prep course for electrical licensing due to surge in demand.

news.summary: On April 9, 2025, Comtech Telecommunications Corp. (NASDAQ: CMTL) based in Chandler, Arizona, disclosed that its subsidiary, Comtech Satellite Networks Technologies Corp. in Montreal, Canada, has successfully delivered the Company's latest Very Small Aperture Terminal ("VSAT") systems to a key allied Navy partner in the Asia Pacific ("APAC") region. The initial shipments mark the beginning of the deployment to strengthen communication capabilities in the region.
news.headline: Comtech delivers VSAT systems to APAC navy partner; Montreal company completes initial deliveries.

news.summary: In Chicago, on April 9, 2025, Mondelēz International, Inc. (Nasdaq: MDLZ) unveiled fresh insights on consumer sentiments regarding indulgence from their sixth annual State of Snacking™ report. This comprehensive study, which delves into how consumers navigate snacking choices, indicates that indulgence and treating continue to shape the snacking landscape. The report highlights that a majority of consumers view snacking as a form of treat or reward, underscoring the enduring popularity of indulgence within the snacking realm.
news.headline: Global survey by Mondelēz International reveals consumers crave intentional indulgence when snacking. Trends show most snack as a treat or reward. #MDLZ

news.summary: In a recent report, it has been revealed that the unemployment rate in the country has reached a record low of 3.8%. This is the lowest rate seen in the past 20 years and is a significant decrease from the previous year's rate of 5.2%. The report also highlights a notable increase in job creation, with over 250,000 new jobs added to the market in the last quarter. Additionally, the average hourly wage has seen a growth of 4.5% compared to the same period last year. Economists attribute this positive trend to various factors, including strong economic growth and increased consumer spending.
news.headline: PacBio projects first quarter 2025 revenue and expects $155-170 million revenue for 2025.

news.summary: NTT DATA, a prominent player in digital business and technology services, unveiled its inaugural sustainability report for NTT Global Data Centers. The report showcases the company's dedication to environmental responsibility and its strides towards reaching Net-Zero emissions within its data centers. By the end of FY23, NTT Global Data Centers managed to attain a noteworthy 51% utilization of renewable energy for non-IT load on a global scale, underlining their commitment to sustainable practices.
news.headline: NTT DATA releases first sustainability report for NTT Global Data Centers division, achieving 51% renewable energy usage in FY23.

news.summary: LandBridge Company LLC (NYSE: LB) disclosed that it will reveal its financial outcomes for the initial quarter of 2025 post-market closure on May 7, 2025. Following this, on May 8, 2025, at 8:00 a.m. CT / 9:00 a.m. ET, LandBridge will conduct a webcast and conference call to analyze these results. For those interested in tuning in, they can access the live webcast by visiting the Events and Presentations segment of the LandBridge Investor Relations webpage.
news.headline: LandBridge Company (NYSE: LB) to release Q1 2025 earnings on May 7th, with conference call on May 8th at 8am CT / 9am ET.

news.summary: In Clifton, New Jersey on April 9, 2025, DREO, a leading smart home company, announced their largest summer release yet on April 8. The unveiling took place at a private event at the EDITION in New York City. The highly-anticipated lineup consists of 12 innovative products, covering categories such as cooling, air quality, and kitchen appliances.
news.headline: DREO unveils 12 smart innovations for summer 2025 to redefine home cooling and air quality. Launch at NYC event.

news.summary: Chicago-based company Jones Lang LaSalle Incorporated (NYSE: JLL) has scheduled a conference call and webcast to review its first quarter 2025 financial performance. The event will take place on Wednesday, May 7, 2025, at 9 a.m. Eastern time. Those interested can join the call by dialing (888)... The company aims to provide insights into its quarterly results during this discussion.
news.headline: JLL to host Q1 2025 earnings call on May 7 at 9am ET. Dial (888)... for live access.

news.summary: Globant, a digitally native company, has entered a strategic partnership with Google Cloud to provide specialized solutions for the Media & Entertainment, Retail, Healthcare, and Finance & Banking industries. This collaboration aims to address sector-specific requirements. The announcement was made in New York on April 9, 2025. Globant, listed on the New York Stock Exchange as GLOB, is emphasizing industry-tailored services through this collaboration.
news.headline: Globant partners with Google Cloud to provide industry-specific AI solutions for Media, Retail, Healthcare, Finance.

news.summary: On April 9, 2025, in Maumee, Ohio, Virtual Technologies Group (VTG), a prominent company in IT, security, and cloud services, announced that they offer tailored solutions to clients in various sectors including education, non-profit organizations, manufacturing, healthcare, and the US federal government.
news.headline: Virtual Technologies Group appoints Quentin Gayles as Chief Revenue Officer to drive growth in diverse sectors.

news.summary: In St. Petersburg, Florida, on April 9, 2025, 3D Cloud, a prominent company specializing in 3D product visualization and configuration for enterprise retailers and manufacturers, announced the appointment of Geoffrey Mark as the new Executive Director for Home. Mark, previously the Director of CGI Strategy and Operations at Crate and Barrel, is expected to bring his expertise to enhance 3D Cloud's services in the home sector.
news.headline: Former Crate and Barrel CGI leader Geoffrey Mark joins 3D Cloud as Executive Director for Home Furnishings. Fla., April 9, 2025.

news.summary: B. Braun Medical Inc., a prominent smart infusion therapy company based in Bethlehem, Pennsylvania, reported on April 9, 2025 that their DUPLEX system has demonstrated lower anticipated direct labor expenses for a pharmacy technician and a nurse compared to both the Baxter Mini-Bag Plus Container System and conventional compounding methods. This could result in significant cost savings for medical facilities. The exact figures were not disclosed but indicate a cost-effective advantage for the DUPLEX system in terms of labor costs.
news.headline: FDA approves B. Braun's Piperacillin & Tazobactam for Injection in DUPLEX system, offering reduced labor costs.

news.summary: In Winter Haven, Florida on April 9, 2025, SouthState Bank unveiled its fifth Corporate Stewardship Report in which it showcases its dedication to communities, employees, corporate stewardship, and environmental initiatives. The report underscores the bank's firm belief in prioritizing customer service and...
news.headline: SouthState Bank releases 2025 Corporate Stewardship Report, emphasizing commitment to communities, employees, environment.
